zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Dormer於1485年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾維可姆時，他的父親William Dormer38歲，母親Agnes Launcelyn27歲。他於1514年之前與Jane Newdegate在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1552年10月20日在英國巴金哈姆爾韋斯特 維可姆享年67歲，埋葬在英國巴金哈姆爾韋斯特 維可姆。

nameMeanings.name: Dormer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname for a lazy man or a sleepyhead from Old French dormeur ‘sleeper, sluggard’ (from Latin dormitor, from dormire ‘to sleep’).

Irish (Kilkenny): when not of the same origin as 1 above, this is a shortened Anglicized form of the Donegal name Ó Díorma, a shortened form of Ó Duibhdhíormaigh ‘descendant of Duibhdhíormach’, a personal name composed of Gaelic dubh ‘black’ + díormach ‘trooper’.
German (Dörmer): occupational name for a watchman on a tower (of a castle or town), from an agent derivative of Middle Low German torn or Middle High German turn ‘tower’. Compare Dermer and Dorner .

variants.name: Dermer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hersh, Pinchas, Yaffa.
German: from an old personal name, Terrimar, a variant of Därr (see Darr ).
German: variant of Dörmer (see Dormer ), an occupational name for a watchman, someone who manned a tower. Compare Derner .

variants.name: Dearmond
meanings: Irish: variant of Dermond, a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Duibhdhiorma ‘descendant of Duibhdhiorma’ a personal name meaning ‘black trooper’ (see Dormer 2). There has been some confusion between the personal names Duibhdhiorma and Diarmaid, so that Dearmond alternates with McDermott . See also Dearman 2.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Dormer was born in 1485, in Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, William Dormer, was 38 and his mother, Agnes Launcelyn, was 27. He married Jane Newdegate before 1514, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 20 October 1552, in West Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 67, and was buried in West Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Dormer est né en 1485, à Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, William Dormer, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Agnes Launcelyn, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Jane Newdegate avant 1514, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 20 octobre 1552, à West Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à West Wycombe, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre.

ko.Ascot, Buckinghamshire England: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 바스-캔아다 벅잉함 아스컷
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Dormer(이)가 1485년 영국 벅잉함실르 윈이코브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Dormer(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Launcelyn(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1514년 이전 영국에서 Jane Newdegate(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1552년 10월 20일 영국 벅잉함실르 웨스트 윈이코브에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 벅잉함실르 웨스트 윈이코브에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Jane Newdegate antes 1514, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. ru.Ascot, Buckinghamshire England: аскот, буккингхам, бас-канада, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Dormer родился в 1485 г. в местности викомб, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Dormer было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Launcelyn, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Newdegate перед 1514 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 20 октября 1552 г. в местности вест викомб, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности вест викомб, буккингхамшир, Англия.
